headline: Why a Passive Income Portfolio With 5 of Warren Buffett’s Highest Yielding Stocks Is Genius
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE: BRK-B) on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio is ... Why a Passive Income Portfolio With 5 of Warren Buffett’s Highest Yielding Stocks Is Genius

headline: Is Coca-Cola (KO) Still Priced Fairly After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
summary: For readers wondering whether Coca-Cola at around US$79.54 is still a fair deal or starting to look expensive, this article walks through the numbers so you can judge the stock's value for yourself. The stock has returned 1.1% over the past week, 1.4% over the past month, 15.1% year to date, 14.0% over 1 year, 44.5% over 3 years and 64.9% over 5 years. Those figures naturally raise questions about how that performance lines up with today's price. Recent headlines around Coca-Cola continue to...

headline: Coca-Cola revives a classic Sprite favorite at one chain
summary: If Baskin-Robbins brought back its York Peppermint Patty flavor at one store in Utah, I'd heavily consider getting on the next plane.
